title: Steelign
body:
Steelign is a new Minecraft Mod that brings Steel to your Minecraft structures and tools. This mod introduces steel, as strong as iron but more decorative. With this material you can make armor, tools, weapons, and diamond-plated steel, that can withstand a lot of power. (as far as iron can go)

 

The Steelign mod also introduces diamond-plated steel, a new decorative type of steel to spruce up your builds.

 

In addition to strong materials, Steelign introduces signs, that can be customized to your liking. With various colors and images to your liking, these signs can label your roads, bridges, or even display other helpful information for others to see.

 

Whether you're a creative builder or a survival player, Steelign is a great addition to your Minecraft gameplay. With new, durable materials and customizable signs, you can up your game and take on new adventures.
